title: Cloud Control Plane Defense
subtitle: GTR-2025 aligned proactive cloud defense against federation, persistence, and resource abuse

steps.title: Service Principal Abuse
steps.description: Attacker uses compromised service principal for cloud control plane access.

steps.title: Federation Tampering
steps.description: Modify SAML federation settings for Golden SAML token forging capability.

steps.title: Federation Change Alert
steps.description: GTR-2025 hunting rules detect unauthorized federation modification.

steps.title: Lambda Backdoor
steps.description: Deploy serverless function backdoor with external invoke permissions.

steps.title: GPU Instance Launch
steps.description: Launch GPU compute instances in unusual regions for crypto-mining.

steps.title: Resource Abuse Alert
steps.description: Cloud resource abuse and persistence detection rules fire.

steps.title: Automated Defense
steps.description: CLAW reverts federation, disables Lambda, terminates instances.

steps.title: SCP Deployment
steps.description: Deploy Service Control Policies preventing future attack patterns.

steps.title: Persistence Hunt
steps.description: Organization-wide hunt for dormant roles, unused keys, orphaned functions.

steps.title: Baseline Update
steps.description: Update cloud configuration baseline and monitoring thresholds.
